en.page-desc: Epic 1 (v0.3 Test integration) + Epic 2 (v0.4 Author attribution) + perf v0.4.1 + Epic 3 (v0.5 chain integrity) + Epic 4 (v0.5 queryability — manual CLI / file-ergonomics checks). State persisted client-side (localStorage). Visible only when launched with `ulog-web --debug ...`.
en.btn-confirm-reset: Reset all checkboxes? This wipes localStorage state for the QA checklist.
en.section-0-desc: Setup checks (seed script, DB, indexer progress, no stack trace, no-git-repo warning) are now covered by tests/test_qa_setup_e2e.py. Run:
en.section-0-footer: If green → §0 done. Skip to §1 below.
en.e1-1.1-1: Section 'Tests' visible in left sidebar between 'Level' and 'Sectors', with flask icon
en.e1-1.1-3: First 5 file groups expanded by default; rest collapsed
en.e1-1.1-4: Each test shows: outcome icon (✓/✗/🔥/⊘) + name + formatted duration (ms/s)
en.e1-1.1-5: Mix of outcomes visible: passed, failed, errored, skipped
en.e1-1.1-6: No raw {# ... #} comment text leaking above the section
en.e1-1.1-7: Records table has a 'Time' column showing context.duration_s formatted (ms / s) for test records, empty for non-test
en.e1-1.1-8: On narrow viewport (<1024px), the records table scrolls horizontally inside its pane — no overflow, no overlapping tooltips, no clipped Message column
en.e1-1.2-1: 'Failed only' checkbox filters list to failed/errored tests
en.e1-1.2-2: 'Slowest top 10' filters list to 10 slowest tests by duration
en.e1-1.3-1: Click a test name in the sidebar → URL becomes /?test_id=tests/<file>.py%3A%3A<test_name> (slash NOT encoded; '::' encoded as %3A%3A)
en.e1-1.3-2: Records list filters to records emitted during this test (incl. propagated app records)
en.e1-1.3-3: Active test visually distinct in sidebar (background or bold)
en.e1-1.3-4: Other filters preserved when clicking a test (level, search, etc.)
en.e1-1.4-1: Click any test record → 'Test context' panel between Context and Exception
en.e1-1.4-2: Panel shows: outcome icon + name + duration
en.e1-1.4-4: 2 links: 'view all records for this test' + 'errors+warnings only'
en.e1-1.5-2: Sections present: Install, CLI flags, Schema, Worked example, Programmatic API, Troubleshooting
en.e1-1.5-3: conftest.py example in rendered code block (no raw markdown)
en.section-2-3-desc: Uncheck hides unknowns ✓, recheck restores them ✓, URL carries show_unknown=0 when off ✓ — all covered by tests/test_show_unknown_toggle_e2e.py (19 Playwright tests). Run:
en.section-2-3-footer: If green → §2.3 done. Skip to §2.4 below.
en.section-2-5-desc: Full git show output in <pre> monospace ✓, ← back to records header link ✓, short-sha in h1 ✓, /diff/abc/ → 400 ✓, /diff/abc;rm/ → 400 ✓, /diff/0000…0000/ → 404 ✓, HTML-escape on commit msg + content ✓, shell-metachar battery ✓ — all covered by tests/test_diff_security_e2e.py. Run:
en.section-2-5-footer: If green → §2.5 done. Skip to §2.6 below.
en.section-2-7-desc: --no-author-index hides block + instant start ✓, --rebuild-author-index reblames ✓, no .git/ emits stderr warning ✓, --no-author-index --rebuild-author-index mutex error ✓ — all covered by tests/test_cli_flags_e2e.py. Run:
en.e2-2.1-1: 'Authors' block visible in left sidebar between 'Files' and 'Time range', with user icon
en.e2-2.1-2: 8 author names listed (Alice Chen, Bob Martin, etc.)
en.e2-2.1-3: Each row: name + truncated email + count
en.e2-2.1-4: <unknown> entry at the end (~1100 test records)
en.e2-2.1-5: 'Show unknown' checkbox at bottom (checked by default)
en.e2-2.2-2: Tick 2 authors → records from either (OR semantics)
en.e2-2.4-1: Open any record → 'Authored by' panel between Test context and Exception
en.e2-2.4-4: 2 links: 'view all records from this author' + 'view diff: <sha>'
en.e2-2.6-2: Sections: How it works, CLI flags, <unknown> semantics, Code vs commit author, Worked example, Performance, Security, Troubleshooting
en.section-3-desc: Perf budgets per PRD-v0.4.1 (cold, warm, level filter, author filter, pagination, detail view, 3s hard ceiling) are now covered by tests/test_qa_perf_e2e.py. Run:
en.section-3-footer: If green → §3 done. Skip to §4 below.
en.e4-reg-9: Dark mode toggle in header — preference persisted
en.section-5-desc: 20-reload RSS < 200 MB ✓, no Logging error / OperationalError on stderr during navigation ✓, git blame indexer doesn't respawn on idle navigation ✓ — all covered by tests/test_stability_e2e.py. Run:
en.section-signoff-desc: When all sections are green (or bugs noted to Claude), tell Claude:
en.section-signoff-line-1: "QA done, bugs: ..." → Claude files the patches
en.section-signoff-line-2: "QA 100% green" → Claude starts Epic 5 (v0.5 incident lifecycle)
en.section-7-intro: Manual checks for CLI output readability, generated-file ergonomics, and end-user error wording. Programmatic coverage in tests/test_replay_*.py / tests/test_filter_dsl.py / tests/test_correlate.py / tests/test_bisect.py / tests/test_cli_queryability.py (113 tests). Sub-sections below cover what auto-tests can't eyeball.
en.section-6-automation-desc: Chain emit smoke ✓, ulog verify output (✓ line / records:N / wall_time / BROKEN with 8-char hex / exit codes 0/1/2) ✓, SchemaError copy-paste-able SQL (extract from message, replay via SQLAlchemy, assert no syntax error + re-bootstrap clean) ✓, Gap G1 wording ✓, repair sidecar JSONL Windows-safe filename + per-line JSON + 64-char lowercase hex ✓, repair refusal stderr ✓, purge dry-run/--confirm/immutable-spared/retention-floor/invalid-date ✓, immutable trigger 'immutable row' + 'invariant I4' wording ✓, verify_state.json pretty-print (indent=2 round-trip) + key schema + OK/BROKEN values + --range no-overwrite + post-repair removal ✓ — all 38 covered by tests/test_qa_epic3_e2e.py. Run:
en.section-6-automation-footer: If green → §6.1 to §6.7 done. Skip to §6.8 below.
en.section-6-8-desc: BROKEN blocks chain-setup ✓, immutable_when raise → fail-safe immutable=1 + stderr message ✓, tampered record_hash detected ✓, retention-floor regression ✓, repair clears sidecar ✓ (test_chain_edge_cases.py). 8 procs × 10K records, chain unbroken under real multi-process contention ✓ (test_chain_concurrency.py, slow-marked). Run:

fr.page-desc: Epic 1 (v0.3 intégration tests) + Epic 2 (v0.4 attribution auteur) + perf v0.4.1 + Epic 3 (v0.5 intégrité chaîne) + Epic 4 (v0.5 queryability — vérifs CLI / ergo manuelles). État persisté côté client (localStorage). Visible uniquement quand lancé avec `ulog-web --debug ...`.
fr.btn-confirm-reset: Réinitialiser toutes les cases ? Ça efface l'état localStorage de la checklist.

fr.section-1-3-title: 1.3 Click sur un nom de test → filter (Story 1.7 / FR65)

fr.e1-1.3-2: Records list filtre aux records émis pendant ce test (incl. records app propagés)
fr.e1-1.3-3: Test actif visuellement distinct dans la sidebar (background ou gras)
fr.e1-1.3-4: Les autres filtres sont préservés quand tu clic un test (level, search, etc.)

fr.e1-1.4-2: Panneau affiche : icône outcome + nom + durée

Couverture programmatique dans tests/test_replay_*.py / tests/test_filter_dsl.py / tests/test_correlate.py / tests/test_bisect.py / tests/test_cli_queryability.py (113 tests). Les sous-sections ci-dessous couvrent ce que les tests auto ne peuvent pas eye-baller.
fr.section-6-automation-desc: Chain emit smoke ✓, output ulog verify (ligne ✓ / records:N / wall_time / BROKEN avec hex 8-char / exit codes 0/1/2) ✓, SQL SchemaError copy-paste-able (extrait du message, replay via SQLAlchemy, assert no syntax error + re-bootstrap clean) ✓, wording Gap G1 ✓, sidecar JSONL repair filename Windows-safe + JSON par ligne + hex 64-char lowercase ✓, refus repair stderr ✓, purge dry-run/--confirm/immutable-spared/retention-floor/invalid-date ✓, wording trigger immutable 'immutable row' + 'invariant I4' ✓, verify_state.json pretty-print (round-trip indent=2) + schema keys + valeurs OK/BROKEN + --range no-overwrite + suppression post-repair ✓ — les 38 couverts par tests/test_qa_epic3_e2e.py. Lance :
